# MenuButtonStyle enumeration

Visual style for chrome buttons (GlassMenu panels). See [`IChromeStyle`](../Stellar.Abstractions.Services/IChromeStyle.md).

```csharp
public enum MenuButtonStyle
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Outline | `0` | Transparent fill + accent border + light label. The default. |
| Filled | `1` | Solid accent fill + dark label. Bold/primary. |
| Glass | `2` | Faint glass fill + thin accent border + light label. Low-emphasis. |
